title: Lamb Souvlaki with Roasted Vegetables
description: A classic Greek-inspired dish featuring marinated lamb souvlaki served with a variety of roasted vegetables.
instructions: Season the lamb souvlaki with salt, pepper, and Greek oregano.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat and cook the lamb souvlaki for 3-4 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the lamb to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Toss the red bell pepper and yellow onion with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a separate baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and lightly charred.
Stir in the kalamata olives and feta cheese with the roasted vegetables.
Serve the lamb souvlaki with the roasted vegetables and a squeeze of lemon juice.
